'''Golanda''' was a female [[Human/Legends|Human]] who led the artillery innovations and tactical deployment at the [[Maw Installation]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|I'm not sure we addressed that contingency when we wrote the manual.|Golanda expresses her concern for destroying the computer backups during the Battle of the Maw|<ref name="CotF" />}}
She died when [[Tol Sivron]] flew the [[Death Star prototype]] into a [[Black hole/Legends|black hole]] while chasing the stolen [[Sun Crusher]] during the [[Battle of the Maw]] in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].<ref name="CotF" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Personality and traits==
Golanda was known to constantly complain, and Tol Sivron thought she was "about as beautiful as a [[Gundark/Legends|gundark]]."<ref name="CotF" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Champions of the Force]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 1996-04-XX -->''[[The Jedi Academy Sourcebook]]''
